title: PureSky
description: A clean and minimalist daytime sky overlay with soft clouds and balanced lighting.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bfeb35dfd1e8512d01a575d803838c5d1f7c3d9.jpeg)

**PureSky** is a simple and refined sky overlay made for players who prefer clarity and light visuals. It keeps the sky clean, bright, and distraction-free while subtly improving depth and atmosphere.

Perfect for PvP and competitive gameplay, it enhances the environment without altering your textures or affecting performance.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
